patch.value:
GitHub: https://github.com/unbraind/pm-cli/issues/468

## Problem
During the 2026-07-06 package dependency sweep, package instructions referenced the pm SDK, but `npm view @unbrained/pm-sdk` returns 404 while the CLI resolves as `@unbrained/pm-cli@2026.7.6`. Agents invent non-existent package coordinates.

## Fix options
- Document the canonical SDK import path (currently exported from @unbrained/pm-cli) in contracts/help + package-author docs; or
- publish/alias @unbrained/pm-sdk if that is the intended coordinate; and
- add a short "latest CLI/SDK package coordinates" section for agents.

Feeds the SDK-first epic pm-usfg: the universal-tool story (pm-w89s, pm-cbwg) needs unambiguous SDK coordinates. Related: pm-ds3b (SDK reference documentation).
GH-468: clarify or publish the pm SDK npm package coordinates (@unbrained/pm-sdk is 404)

Dogfood GH-468: package-author instructions say 'latest pm CLI and pm SDK' but npm view @unbrained/pm-sdk returns 404 — authors cannot tell whether the SDK is embedded in @unbrained/pm-cli, published elsewhere, or unpublished. Duplicate check: searched publish SDK npm package — pm-ds3b covers SDK reference docs, no item covers the package-coordinates decision.

Canonical SDK import/package coordinates documented in pm contracts/help output and package-author docs; either @unbrained/pm-sdk is published/aliased or docs state explicitly the SDK ships inside @unbrained/pm-cli; a 'latest CLI/SDK package coordinates' section exists for agents

author: claude-code-agent
message: Bundle SDK package-coordinate docs with SDK-first runtime PR.

value.note: Documents canonical SDK package coordinates inside @unbrained/pm-cli

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Implementation note: SDK package coordinates documented in docs/SDK.md: the SDK ships inside @unbrained/pm-cli; there is no separate @unbrained/pm-sdk package. This is bundled with the SDK primitive PR so package authors get code and docs together.

value.author: codex-sdk-primitives-agent
value.text: Evidence: docs/SDK.md now documents that the SDK ships inside @unbrained/pm-cli, with imports from @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk. pnpm changelog:pm:check confirmed CHANGELOG.md is unchanged with pm-changelog 2026.7.6.

patch.value: docs/SDK.md now clarifies that the SDK ships with @unbrained/pm-cli and is imported from @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk.
Package authors know the correct npm package and import path for SDK usage.
SDK docs updated and pm-changelog 2026.7.6 check confirmed CHANGELOG.md is unchanged.

value.author: codex-sdk-primitives-agent
value.text: Follow-up evidence after pre-push Greptile review: defaulted SDK create/update mutation option parameters, preserved SDK author precedence over lifecycle assignee aliases, and added regression coverage for no-options update plus assignee fallback behavior. Verification passed: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/sdk/sdk-index.spec.ts; pnpm typecheck; pnpm lint; node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage (Statements 100%, Branches 100%, Functions 100%, Lines 100%; 5448 tests).

value.author: codex-sdk-primitives-agent
value.text: Pre-push review follow-up: Greptile review d8627c63-d12f-4c7d-a1d1-2eb565d52de0 reported no review comments. Addressed its summary consistency note by defaulting the standalone SDK create wrapper options to {} as well. Fresh verification passed: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/sdk/sdk-index.spec.ts; pnpm typecheck; pnpm lint; node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage (5448 tests, Statements/Branches/Functions/Lines all 100%).

value.author: codex-sdk-primitives-agent
value.text: PR #477 review-loop evidence: addressed Greptile PR comment on top-level restore target handling. runAction({ action: 'restore', id, target }) now honors the schema-declared top-level target while preserving options.target precedence. Verification passed: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/sdk/sdk-index.spec.ts; pnpm typecheck; node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage (5448 tests, 100/100/100/100).

value.author: codex-sdk-primitives-agent
value.text: PR #477 review-loop evidence: after bundling SDK read primitives, structured create payloads, SDK lifecycle mutations, SDK package-coordinate docs, and lifecycle alias ergonomics into one PR, addressed additional CodeRabbit/Cubic feedback by centralizing hidden Commander option registration, rejecting conflicting lifecycle --author/--assignee inputs, strengthening composite lifecycle alias tests, and adding command-doc tracker references. Verification passed: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/commands/register-commands.spec.ts; pnpm typecheck; pnpm lint; node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage (5448 tests, 100/100/100/100).

value.author: codex-sdk-primitives-agent
value.text: PR #477 Greptile review-loop evidence: fixed SDK/MCP compound start-task and pause-task alias leakage by stripping the lifecycle-only assignee alias before forwarding options to runUpdate, while preserving the alias for claim/release ownership resolution. Added regression coverage for client default author precedence when assignee alias differs. Verification passed: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/sdk/sdk-index.spec.ts; pnpm typecheck; pnpm lint; node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage (5448 tests, 100/100/100/100).

value.author: codex-sdk-primitives-agent
value.text: PR #477 final Greptile follow-up: SDK docs/package-coordinate bundle remains current after restore projection parity fix; verification passed with SDK focused tests, typecheck, lint, and full coverage 100/100/100/100.
